name: Whitestone REIT
summary: Whitestone REIT is a Maryland-based real estate investment trust that owns and operates Community Centered Properties—commercially diverse retail and mixed-use properties in culturally diverse, high-growth metropolitan markets in Texas and Arizona. As of December 31, 2025, the company wholly owned 56 properties totaling approximately 4.9 million square feet of GLA, with tenants in specialty retail, grocery, restaurants, medical, educational, financial services, and entertainment sectors.

products.name: Community Centered Properties
products.description: Commercially diverse retail and mixed-use properties leased to tenants serving culturally diverse neighborhoods in Texas and Arizona metropolitan markets.

partnerships.partner_name: Pillarstone Capital REIT Operating Partnership LP
partnerships.description: Whitestone contributed properties to Pillarstone OP; exercised redemption notice in January 2024 and received $33.4 million settlement in December 2025 via bankruptcy proceedings.
